operations.name: apply_row_access_policy
operations.sql_summary: CREATE ROW ACCESS POLICY cf_paid_orders_policy ON b2g_silver_orders GRANT TO service account FILTER USING status = 'paid'

operations.name: impersonated_reader_enforcement_query
operations.tool: BigQuery jobs.query REST API with impersonated service account token

iam_prerequisites: The reader service account has BigQuery job and table read roles for the test project.
The smoke operator must be allowed to impersonate the reader service account to execute the negative/filtered read check.
non_claims: This smoke validates BigQuery row access policy apply, readback and restricted-principal enforcement only.
Policy tags, data masking, overwrite retention and governance evidence ledger parity remain separate GCP gates.
The smoke report intentionally omits the operator principal used to perform service-account impersonation.
